comment.body: Also take into consideration that some of the options going into the VIX calculation are very illiquid and hence have big bid-ask spreads. That distorts the result and also leads to VIX being higher than the curve (the same thing could be observed on Aug 5 when VIX futures never went as high as VIX)
comment.raw_body: Also take into consideration that some of the options going into the VIX calculation are very illiquid and hence have big bid-ask spreads.
